title: ProjectContacts
description: Layer 3 — the pending-contacts 'waiting room' of a concrete project (projects/<slug>/contacts.json). People who appeared around the customer but are NOT yet participants (unknown / unconfirmed role). Kept out of project-participants so they never render into the project people table. Each entry only references a person in the shared registry (people-registry.schema.json) via 'ref'; once their project role is clarified they are promoted to project-participants and deleted from here.

project.description: Project slug, identical to the containing folder name.

comment.description: Free-form explanation of the file's purpose and the ref / promote / delete rules.

contacts.description: People captured around the customer whose project role is not yet confirmed.

ref.description: Reference to a person 'id' in the shared people-registry (projects/users.json).

note.description: Short context — who they are, the source of the contact, and what still needs to be filled in.
